purpose: Claude CLI orchestration. Builds the prompt envelope (context JSON + task), spawns the `claude` CLI as a child process with stdin/stdout piping, and parses the trailing CTX_UPDATE: line from the response to round-trip context state.
invariants: The CTX_UPDATE: prefix (no space) is the exact separator; extractContextUpdate scans backward from response end to skip JSON examples in preamble.
extractContextUpdate returns null on invalid JSON or missing line — never partial updates.
runWithClaude rejects with a custom message on ENOENT (CLI not installed); other spawn errors propagate.
Prompt envelope passes the projected agent context (via inject.buildAgentContext) so the CLI sees the same shape that CLAUDE.md auto-block contains.
gotchas: extractContextUpdate scans from bottom-up: a code block in the response containing the literal text "CTX_UPDATE:" can confuse it.
stripContextUpdate filters all lines starting with `CTX_UPDATE:` globally — the user logging that prefix in their own output is also stripped.
spawn `shell: true` is set only on Windows; POSIX shells use array-form arg parsing — quoting differs.
